_note: Re-recorded for u136 Step 3 (feed-image-metadata-harvest); original u1 Extension #2 recording was 2026-05-01. Tests must NOT re-fetch — they replay this body via httpx.MockTransport. Re-record only when the live feed structure changes; document the change in aidlc-docs/audit.md. Yahoo's rssindex feed has no <description> element on items (per FD L6.5: summary=None on emitted NormalizedItem); <pubDate> is ISO 8601 with Z suffix on items (channel-level pubDate uses RFC 822 form, but channel pubDate is not consumed). <source> element carries the originating outlet (e.g. "Reuters", "Barchart"), captured into raw_metadata.rss_source. u136: all 48 items carry a <media:content url=… width="130" height="86"> thumbnail on the zenfs CDN — the URLs are extension-less content hashes and the elements have NO type attr, so the shared extract_feed_image helper accepts them via the positive width+height dimension pair; the adapter harvests image_url/image_width/image_height into raw_metadata. Every <media:credit role="publishing company"> element in this recording is EMPTY (self-closing, no text), so image_credit is absent on all replayed items — the credit→image_credit mapping is pinned by synthetic XML in the adapter test instead. Recorded with the same browser UA the production adapter sends (Yahoo requires it).
